meaning: adj.不狡诈的,坦率的,正直的
examples: Joanne was so guileless that Claire had no option but to believe her.
Dogs being guileless signed and delivered.
He had never seen such a guileless countenance.
And if they continue to play in this gutless and guileless fashion relegation is a very real possibility.
But, contrary to what some guileless Lib Dems imagine, this would not do much good to their own party.
